title: Trump walks out of 'Meet the Press' interview
shortDescription: President Donald Trump abruptly walked out an interview with NBC's "Meet the Press" after Kristen Welker challenged unsubstantiated election claims.

title: Takeaways from Trump's contentious, rainy 'Meet the Press' interview
shortDescription: President Trump abruptly ended a contentious ‒ and rainy ‒ interview with NBC's "Meet the Press." Here are key takeaways from the tense interview.

title: Trump ends tense 'Meet the Press' interview, walks away from host
shortDescription: President Donald Trump called "Meet the Press" moderator Kristen Welker "crooked" or "stupid" after she challenged his election security claims.

title: These Republicans rejected the 2020 election result. Now they're running
shortDescription: Many Republicans who supported President Donald Trump's effort to overturn his 2020 loss are now running for governor of their state.

title: Trump to join Biden in 80-year-old presidents' club: Is his health an issue?
shortDescription: Trump is set to become the second president after Joe Biden to reach 80, and, like Biden, he is facing questions about his health and fitness.

title: Federal judge halts Trump SNAP funding restrictions in 20 states and DC
shortDescription: Federal judge temporarily blocks USDA conditions on SNAP and other nutrition funding, siding with states that argue the rules threaten food aid programs.

title: GOP hopeful meets Castro grandson in Havana as US tightens screws
shortDescription: GOP candidate Vic Mellor met with Raul Castro's grandson in Cuba, sparking questions about his unauthorized diplomatic trip.

title: Trump pardons ex-GOP congressman over insider trading conviction
shortDescription: President Donald Trump pardoned former Indiana Republican Congressman Steve Buyer, who was convicted in 2023 of insider trading.

title: Hunter Biden is going (very) viral in his own words
shortDescription: Former first son Hunter Biden was plagued by scandal, cast by critics as an X-rated troublemaker. Then, he started tweeting on X.

title: California ballot counting continues as Becerra advances in governor's race
shortDescription: Beccera projected to advance to general election for California governor after taking slim lead over Hilton as votes are still being counted for fifth day.

title: Trump pardons former Republican congressman. Why?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump pardoned former Indiana Republican Congressman Steve Buyer, who was convicted in 2023 of insider trading.

title: Gov. Kemp, Senate candidate accused of pay-to-play politics in Georgia
shortDescription: Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp and U.S. Senate candidate Derek Dooley have been accused of participating in pay-to-play politics ahead of Republican runoff.

title: House member's chief of staff charged with carrying gun into Capitol complex
shortDescription: The chief of staff for Rep. Pete Sessions is facing charges at a Washington, DC, court for allegedly bringing a firearm into the Capitol complex.

title: Olympic champion gifts Trump a gold medal
shortDescription: Two-time Olympic gold medalist Jordan Stolz gave President Donald Trump one of his gold medals at an event for Wisconsin farmers.

title: Trump on ticket prices: 'That's the way life is'
shortDescription: President Trump, who said he plans to attend Game 3, was asked about high ticket prices for the NBA Finals, saying "that's the way life is, you know?"

title: President Trump considers government owning stake in AI companies
shortDescription: President Trump said he's exploring the federal government acquiring shares in AI companies, likening it to a "partnership with the American people."

title: Trump says he supports salary cap for Major League Baseball
shortDescription: President Trump said MLB needs a salary cap, siding with the owners as the league works on a new CBA to avoid a lockout after the season.

title: Maine oysterfarmer Graham Platner through his campaign for U.S. Senate
shortDescription: Oysterfarmer and Democrat Graham Platner hopes to defeat Republican Sen. Susan Collins in Maine's U.S. Senate race.

title: What the latest poll says about Washington DC mayoral election
shortDescription: Janeese Lewis George still leads Kenyan McDuffie in the latest Washington DC mayoral poll, but by how much? And will ranked choice voting matter?

title: Murder charge dismissed for Arkansas GOP sheriff nominee
shortDescription: A murder case against an Arkansas GOP sheriff nominee has been dismissed after officials lost evidence.

title: Whistleblower: DOGE pushed Social Security to assign fake death dates
shortDescription: Trump officials planned to mark 2.7 million living people as dead, whistleblower claims.

title: Watch Trump news and his weekend schedule from Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: President Donald Trump could build "Trump Promenade" in DC. He is headed to Wisconsin today and to the NBA Finals game on Monday. Watch the rundown.

title: What is Donald Trump's approval rating? Voters weigh in on gas prices
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's endorsements have carried heavy weight in the midterm primaries, even as he has a low approval rating. What is it?
